scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development dotenv -e .env -- pnpm run dev:app
scripts.dev:app: cross-env NODE_ENV=development dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --parallel -F @zhblogs/api -F @zhblogs/web run dev
scripts.dev:api: cross-env NODE_ENV=development dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @zhblogs/api run dev
scripts.dev:web: cross-env NODE_ENV=development dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @zhblogs/web run dev
scripts.dev:status: cross-env NODE_ENV=development dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @zhblogs/status run dev
scripts.dev:cloudflare: cross-env NODE_ENV=development dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @zhblogs/cloudflare run dev
scripts.build: cross-env NODE_ENV=production dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @zhblogs/api -F @zhblogs/web run build
scripts.build:api: cross-env NODE_ENV=production dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @zhblogs/api run build
scripts.build:web: cross-env NODE_ENV=production dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @zhblogs/web run build
scripts.build:status: cross-env NODE_ENV=production dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @zhblogs/status run build
scripts.build:cloudflare: cross-env NODE_ENV=production dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @zhblogs/cloudflare run build
scripts.preview: cross-env NODE_ENV=production dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --parallel -F @zhblogs/api -F @zhblogs/web run preview
scripts.preview:app: cross-env NODE_ENV=production dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --parallel -F @zhblogs/api -F @zhblogs/web run preview
scripts.preview:api: cross-env NODE_ENV=production dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @zhblogs/api run preview
scripts.preview:web: cross-env NODE_ENV=production dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @zhblogs/web run preview
scripts.preview:status: cross-env NODE_ENV=production dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @zhblogs/status run preview
scripts.preview:cloudflare: cross-env NODE_ENV=production dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @zhblogs/cloudflare run preview
scripts.test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test dotenv -e .env -- pnpm run test:all
scripts.test:all: cross-env NODE_ENV=test dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -r --if-present run test
scripts.test:api: cross-env NODE_ENV=test dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @zhblogs/api run test
scripts.test:web: cross-env NODE_ENV=test dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @zhblogs/web run test
scripts.test:status: cross-env NODE_ENV=test dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @zhblogs/status run test
scripts.test:cloudflare: cross-env NODE_ENV=test dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @zhblogs/cloudflare run test
